title: What ATS parsers actually check on your CV in 2026

scenes.narration: What an ATS parser actually checks on your CV in 2026. The plain English version.
The honest answer first. An ATS does not give your CV a score. The score is a myth. What it actually does is parse your CV into structured fields and store you in a database the recruiter searches.

visual.heading: What an ATS does
bullets: Parses your CV into structured fields
Stores you in a searchable database
Returns matches when the recruiter searches
Does not auto-reject based on a score

scenes.narration: What it parses. Name. Email. Phone. Each work experience entry — title, company, dates, bullets. Education entries. Skills section. Some ATSes also extract years of experience and certifications.

visual.heading: Fields ATSes extract
bullets: Each role · title, company, dates, bullets

scenes.narration: What goes wrong. Multi-column CVs get interleaved into nonsense — Workday is the worst offender for this. Headers and footers get dropped — Lever has historically dropped them. Section titles the parser does not recognise as section titles get treated as plain text. Skills hidden inside images cannot be extracted at all.

visual.heading: What breaks parsing
bullets: Header / footer text · Lever historically drops
Non-standard section titles · 'My Voyage' instead of 'Experience'
Fancy PDF encoding from Mac Pages · garbled output

scenes.narration: The five major ATSes have specific quirks. Workday reads PDFs in document-stream order. Greenhouse strips emoji codepoints. Lever historically drops header and footer text. Taleo, the Oracle-owned legacy parser, is strict on standard section names. iCIMS configuration varies tenant to tenant.

visual.heading: 5 ATSes · 5 quirks
bullets: Greenhouse · strips emoji, wants exact section names

scenes.narration: How to test. CV Mirror — a free, open-source, client-side tool — simulates how all five parse your CV side by side. No signup. Nothing uploads. The actual parsed output, not an invented score.

The fix. If all five parsers extract your fields cleanly, no ATS is stopping you. Real rejection happens at human review — by the recruiter who searched the database. Fix the parse first, then focus on what the human reads.

visual.subtitle: Then focus on what the human reads

scenes.narration: More guidance at aimvantage.uk slash blog. The Vantage AI tool runs CV Mirror automatically as part of the application prep flow.

visual.subtitle: Free CV-vs-role analysis · Cover letter · Mock interview
